name: TeeTime Golf
about: TeeTime Golf is a members-only indoor golf training facility in Tulsa, Oklahoma, featuring Trackman technology for self-service practice and professional coaching. The venue offers a dedicated private golf studio and gym, alongside mobile simulator rentals for events. It is operated by owner Derik Keim, a Titleist Performance Institute (TPI) certified coach and Trackman Certified professional, focusing on data-driven swing analysis and junior golf programs. Membership is required for access to the indoor studio, while mobile simulator services are available for rental for private and corporate events.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Trackman launch monitor technology for detailed shot analysis
Titleist Performance Institute certified coaching for game improvement
Flexible membership options and mobile simulator availability for events
Specialized junior golf programs to develop young athletes

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor for the indoor studio and mobile experience

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are required to bring your own clubs to use the Trackman simulators and for coaching sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The BYOB policy is not explicitly stated. It is recommended to contact TeeTime Golf directly for clarification on outside food and drink.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: An 18-hole simulation typically takes about 2-3 hours, depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, TeeTime Golf specializes in junior golf programs and offers services for young athletes, making it a kid-friendly environment for learning the game.
